(node:28248) ExperimentalWarning: VM Modules is an experimental feature and might change at any time
(Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created)
(node:23632) ExperimentalWarning: VM Modules is an experimental feature and might change at any time
(Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created)
(node:25736) ExperimentalWarning: VM Modules is an experimental feature and might change at any time
(Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created)
(node:28248) Warning: SECURITY WARNING: The SSL modes 'prefer', 'require', and 'verify-ca' are treated as aliases for 'verify-full'.
In the next major version (pg-connection-string v3.0.0 and pg v9.0.0), these modes will adopt standard libpq semantics, which have weaker security guarantees.

To prepare for this change:
- If you want the current behavior, explicitly use 'sslmode=verify-full'
- If you want libpq compatibility now, use 'uselibpqcompat=true&sslmode=require'

See https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-ssl.html for libpq SSL mode definitions.

      ΓêÜ should return 403 if authenticated as nurse (not coordinator/admin) (87 ms)

- If you want libpq compatibility now, use 'uselibpqcompat=true&sslmode=require'

FAIL tests/day11_m6_progress_duration.test.js (7.856 s)
  PUT /api/theatres/:id/progress ΓÇô Surgery Progress Update
    Authentication
      ΓêÜ should return 401 when no token is provided (9 ms)
    Authorisation
      ΓêÜ should return 403 when called by a staff (non-coordinator) user (80 ms)
    Input validation
      ΓêÜ should return 400 when progress is missing from request body (92 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 when progress is below 0 (111 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 when progress exceeds 100 (84 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 for a non-integer progress value (e.g. 45.5) (68 ms)
    Not found scenarios
      ΓêÜ should return 404 for a non-existent theatre ID (217 ms)
    No in-progress surgery
      ΓêÜ should return 404 when the theatre exists but has no in-progress surgery (426 ms)
    Happy path
      ΓêÜ should return 200 with a valid theatre and in-progress surgery (185 ms)
      ΓêÜ should accept 0 as a valid progress value (156 ms)
      ΓêÜ should accept 100 as a valid progress value (156 ms)
  GET /api/theatres/:id/duration ΓÇô Theatre Duration Calculation
    Authentication
      ΓêÜ should return 401 when no token is provided (4 ms)
      ΓêÜ should allow any authenticated user (staff) to access duration (209 ms)
    Not found
      ΓêÜ should return 404 for a non-existent theatre ID (155 ms)
    No in-progress surgery
      ├ù should return 200 with null data when theatre has no in-progress surgery (429 ms)
    Happy path (theatre with in-progress surgery)
      ΓêÜ should return 200 with elapsed, remaining, and total duration fields (158 ms)
      ΓêÜ elapsed + remaining should roughly equal total_minutes (173 ms)
      ΓêÜ formatted strings should not be empty (702 ms)

  ΓùÅ GET /api/theatres/:id/duration ΓÇô Theatre Duration Calculation ΓÇ║ No in-progress surgery ΓÇ║ should return 200 with null data when theatre has no in-progress surgery

    expect(received).toBeNull()

      ΓêÜ Admin should NOT access coordinator-only routes (79 ms)
      ΓêÜ Surgeon should NOT access coordinator-only routes (79 ms)

      ΓêÜ Nurse should access staff routes (112 ms)

      ΓêÜ Technician should access staff routes (163 ms)

      ΓêÜ Nurse should access any-authenticated routes (586 ms)

      ΓêÜ Request without token should be denied (401) (3 ms)
      ΓêÜ Request with invalid token should be denied (401) (36 ms)
      ΓêÜ Request with malformed Authorization header should be denied (4 ms)
      ΓêÜ Request with expired token should be denied (7 ms)
    Cross-Role Access Verification
      ΓêÜ Each role should only access their permitted routes (481 ms)

(node:25432) Warning: SECURITY WARNING: The SSL modes 'prefer', 'require', and 'verify-ca' are treated as aliases for 'verify-full'.
In the next major version (pg-connection-string v3.0.0 and pg v9.0.0), these modes will adopt standard libpq semantics, which have weaker security guarantees.

To prepare for this change:
- If you want the current behavior, explicitly use 'sslmode=verify-full'
- If you want libpq compatibility now, use 'uselibpqcompat=true&sslmode=require'

See https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-ssl.html for libpq SSL mode definitions.

- If you want libpq compatibility now, use 'uselibpqcompat=true&sslmode=require'

(node:23632) Warning: SECURITY WARNING: The SSL modes 'prefer', 'require', and 'verify-ca' are treated as aliases for 'verify-full'.
In the next major version (pg-connection-string v3.0.0 and pg v9.0.0), these modes will adopt standard libpq semantics, which have weaker security guarantees.

To prepare for this change:
- If you want the current behavior, explicitly use 'sslmode=verify-full'
- If you want libpq compatibility now, use 'uselibpqcompat=true&sslmode=require'

See https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-ssl.html for libpq SSL mode definitions.

(node:28628) Warning: SECURITY WARNING: The SSL modes 'prefer', 'require', and 'verify-ca' are treated as aliases for 'verify-full'.
In the next major version (pg-connection-string v3.0.0 and pg v9.0.0), these modes will adopt standard libpq semantics, which have weaker security guarantees.

To prepare for this change:
- If you want the current behavior, explicitly use 'sslmode=verify-full'
- If you want libpq compatibility now, use 'uselibpqcompat=true&sslmode=require'

See https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-ssl.html for libpq SSL mode definitions.

- If you want libpq compatibility now, use 'uselibpqcompat=true&sslmode=require'

PASS tests/day17_m6_notification_flow.test.js (13.344 s)
  Flow 1 ΓÇô Full Notification Lifecycle (M6 Day 17)
    ΓêÜ Step 1: coordinator creates a notification for themselves (225 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 2: notification appears in the list for current user (216 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 3: unread-count reflects the new notification (157 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 4: mark the notification as read (179 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 5: the notification no longer appears as unread after mark-read (297 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 6: mark-all-read returns count 0 when called again (304 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 7: unread-count is 0 after mark-all-read (135 ms)
  Flow 2 ΓÇô Polling Delta Flow (M6 Day 17)
    ΓêÜ Step 1: record a timestamp (before creating new notifications) (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 2: create a new notification after the timestamp (369 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 3: poll returns only notifications created after sinceTimestamp (228 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 4: poll with a future timestamp returns empty array (224 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 5: staff user cannot see coordinator notifications via poll (230 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 6: poll without since param returns 400 (106 ms)
    ΓêÜ Step 7: poll with invalid timestamp returns 400 (71 ms)
  Flow 3 ΓÇô Pagination Flow (M6 Day 17)
    ΓêÜ page 1 (limit=2, offset=0) returns 2 notifications (202 ms)
    ΓêÜ page 2 (limit=2, offset=2) returns a different page (432 ms)
    ΓêÜ hasMore is true when more pages exist (241 ms)
    ΓêÜ hasMore is false on the last page (432 ms)
  Flow 4 ΓÇô is_read Filter Flow (M6 Day 17)
    ΓêÜ ?is_read=false returns only unread notifications (203 ms)
    ΓêÜ ?is_read=true returns only read notifications (189 ms)
    ΓêÜ ?is_read=false does NOT include the read notification (222 ms)
  Flow 5 ΓÇô Notification Types Flow (M6 Day 17)
    ΓêÜ GET /types returns all 5 valid types with labels (105 ms)
    ΓêÜ can create a notification for each valid type (1070 ms)
    ΓêÜ creating with an invalid type returns 400 (90 ms)
    ΓêÜ GET /notifications?type=reminder returns only reminder type (407 ms)
    ΓêÜ GET /notifications?type=invalid_type returns 400 (77 ms)
  Flow 6 ΓÇô Cleanup Flow (M6 Day 17)
    ΓêÜ staff gets 403 when attempting cleanup (66 ms)
    ΓêÜ coordinator can perform cleanup and receives a count (135 ms)
    ΓêÜ unauthenticated request to cleanup returns 401 (4 ms)
  Flow 7 ΓÇô User Isolation Flow (M6 Day 17)
    ΓêÜ staff user list does NOT include coordinator notifications (201 ms)
    ΓêÜ staff cannot mark coordinator notification as read (404) (149 ms)
    ΓêÜ GET /api/notifications returns 401 for unauthenticated request (4 ms)
    ΓêÜ PUT /api/notifications/read-all returns 401 for unauthenticated request (3 ms)

  console.log
    Created test staff

      at Object.<anonymous> (tests/day9_staff_assignment.test.js:59:21)

  M6 Theatre API Tests ΓÇô Day 10

      ΓêÜ GET /api/theatres ΓåÆ 401 without token (9 ms)
      ΓêÜ GET /api/theatres/availability ΓåÆ 401 without token (4 ms)
      ΓêÜ GET /api/theatres/:id ΓåÆ 401 without token (4 ms)
      ΓêÜ PUT /api/theatres/:id/status ΓåÆ 401 without token (5 ms)
      ΓêÜ GET /api/theatres/:id/current-surgery ΓåÆ 401 without token (5 ms)
    GET /api/theatres ΓÇô list theatres
      ΓêÜ should return success + array + count with valid token (162 ms)
      ΓêÜ should allow staff users to view the list (270 ms)
      ΓêÜ should reject an invalid status filter with 400 (78 ms)
      ΓêÜ should reject an invalid type filter with 400 (90 ms)
      ΓêÜ should accept ?status=available filter and return only matching theatres (262 ms)
      ΓêÜ should accept ?type=general filter and return only matching theatres (190 ms)
      ΓêÜ should accept combined status + type filters (175 ms)
      ΓêÜ each theatre in the list should have required fields (175 ms)
    GET /api/theatres/availability ΓÇô check availability
      ΓêÜ should return 400 when all query params are missing (78 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 when date is missing (87 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 when time is missing (72 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 when duration is missing (100 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 for non-numeric duration (76 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 for zero or negative duration (88 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return success with all required params (243 ms)
      ΓêÜ each theatre in availability response should have an "available" boolean field (326 ms)
      ΓêÜ should allow staff to check availability (224 ms)
      ΓêÜ response should echo back the query params (739 ms)
    GET /api/theatres/:id ΓÇô theatre detail
      ΓêÜ should return 404 for a non-existent theatre (id = 999999) (150 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return detail for a real theatre (459 ms)
      ΓêÜ should include upcoming_surgeries array in detail response (456 ms)
      ΓêÜ should include surgery_history array in detail response (444 ms)
      ΓêÜ should include stats object in detail response (424 ms)
      ΓêÜ should allow staff to view theatre detail (374 ms)
    PUT /api/theatres/:id/status ΓÇô update status (RBAC + validation)
      ΓêÜ should return 403 when staff user tries to update status (74 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 when status field is missing (71 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 for an invalid status value (75 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 404 for a non-existent theatre (134 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return 400 for an invalid status transition (550 ms)
      ΓêÜ coordinator can update to a valid next status (1335 ms)
      ΓêÜ successful status update should include previous status in message (659 ms)
    GET /api/theatres/:id/current-surgery ΓÇô current surgery
      ΓêÜ should return 404-like 401 without token (4 ms)
      ΓêÜ should return success + null data when no surgery is in progress (145 ms)
      ΓêÜ current surgery endpoint should work for staff users (166 ms)
      ΓêÜ response data (when present) should have surgery fields (154 ms)

  console.log
    Got theatre ID: 8

      at Object.<anonymous> (tests/day9_staff_assignment.test.js:74:21)

(node:28628) Warning: SECURITY WARNING: The SSL modes 'prefer', 'require', and 'verify-ca' are treated as aliases for 'verify-full'.
In the next major version (pg-connection-string v3.0.0 and pg v9.0.0), these modes will adopt standard libpq semantics, which have weaker security guarantees.

To prepare for this change:
- If you want the current behavior, explicitly use 'sslmode=verify-full'
- If you want libpq compatibility now, use 'uselibpqcompat=true&sslmode=require'

See https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-ssl.html for libpq SSL mode definitions.

(node:25948) Warning: SECURITY WARNING: The SSL modes 'prefer', 'require', and 'verify-ca' are treated as aliases for 'verify-full'.
In the next major version (pg-connection-string v3.0.0 and pg v9.0.0), these modes will adopt standard libpq semantics, which have weaker security guarantees.

To prepare for this change:
- If you want the current behavior, explicitly use 'sslmode=verify-full'
- If you want libpq compatibility now, use 'uselibpqcompat=true&sslmode=require'

See https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/libpq-ssl.html for libpq SSL mode definitions.

- If you want the current behavior, explicitly use 'sslmode=verify-full'
- If you want libpq compatibility now, use 'uselibpqcompat=true&sslmode=require'

PASS tests/day16_m6_scheduler.test.js
  Scheduler ΓÇô checkSurgeryReminders (M6 Day 16)
    ΓêÜ should not create any notifications when there are no upcoming surgeries (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ should create one notification per staff member (surgeon + anaesthetist) (2 ms)
    ΓêÜ should also notify nurses assigned to the surgery (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ should NOT send a reminder if one has already been sent for the same user+surgery (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ should use manual_patient_name when patient_name is null (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ should not throw when a database query fails (2 ms)
    ΓêÜ should process multiple surgeries in one run (1 ms)

PASS tests/theatreConstants.test.js
  Theatre Constants
    ΓêÜ should define exactly 4 theatre statuses (2 ms)
    ΓêÜ THEATRE_STATUS should be a frozen enum (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ should define exactly 6 theatre types (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ THEATRE_TYPE should be a frozen enum
    ΓêÜ THEATRE_STATUS_LABELS should map every status to a string (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ THEATRE_TYPE_LABELS should map every type to a string (1 ms)
    ΓêÜ isValidTheatreStatus returns true for valid statuses
    ΓêÜ isValidTheatreStatus returns false for invalid strings
    ΓêÜ isValidTheatreType returns true for valid types
    ΓêÜ isValidTheatreType returns false for invalid strings
    ΓêÜ THEATRE_STATUS_TRANSITIONS should be frozen
    ΓêÜ getAllowedTransitions returns correct transitions for available
    ΓêÜ getAllowedTransitions returns correct transitions for in_use
    ΓêÜ getAllowedTransitions returns correct transitions for maintenance
    ΓêÜ getAllowedTransitions returns correct transitions for cleaning
    ΓêÜ getAllowedTransitions returns empty array for unknown status
    ΓêÜ no status can transition to itself
  Theatre Validation Middleware
    validateTheatreStatus
      ΓêÜ calls next() for a valid status (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ returns 400 when status is missing (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ returns 400 for an invalid status value (1 ms)
      ΓêÜ accepts all valid statuses
    validateTheatreFilters
      ΓêÜ calls next() when no filters are provided
      ΓêÜ calls next() for valid status filter
      ΓêÜ calls next() for valid type filter
      ΓêÜ returns 400 for invalid status filter
      ΓêÜ returns 400 for invalid type filter
      ΓêÜ calls next() when both valid filters are provided

PASS tests/day18_m3_demographics.test.js
  Patient Demographics Analytics - M3 Day 18
    Route mounting verification
      ΓêÜ GET /api/analytics/patient-demographics should return 401 without token (route is mounted) (8 ms)
    GET /api/analytics/patient-demographics
      ΓêÜ should return 200 with demographics data for authenticated user (493 ms)
      ΓêÜ response should contain total, gender, bloodType, and ageGroups fields (73 ms)
      ΓêÜ gender array should have valid entries with gender, count, and percentage (77 ms)
      ΓêÜ bloodType array should have valid entries with bloodType, count, and percentage (80 ms)
      ΓêÜ ageGroups array should have valid entries with ageGroup, count, and percentage (66 ms)
      ΓêÜ percentages within gender should sum close to 100 when patients exist (75 ms)
      ΓêÜ gender counts should sum to total patients (100 ms)
      ΓêÜ should be accessible by nurse role (73 ms)

      ΓêÜ should use secure JWT tokens
